changelog:
Added features and fixed bugs in version 1.5.4.
- Fixed "keep screen on doesn't work" issue
- Added "clear search" button to playlist view
- Show update notification after granting permissions
- Retrying failed updates automatically
- Improved P2P interactions with secure passcode checking
- Persistent quota saving to device, preventing uninstall-reinstall exploits
- Display device ID in settings for user-specific activities
- Added quick action for instant downloads from YouTube
- Implemented a double-sided referral system
- Fixed 8007 and 8012 radio error and status endpoint errors with InteractActivity P2P sharing
- Resolved IllegalArgumentException in WordIterator usage
- Fixed RecoverableSecurityException related to media content access
- Addressed ForegroundServiceStartNotAllowedException in MusicNotificationService
- Improved processing status handling by retrying API calls after 1000 ms delay
- Enhanced mini-notification spacing based on notification size
- Redesigned rewarded ad UI for download credits
- Fixed issue with the refer and earn card not working
- Added developer messages
